subject: Re: MotionCor3
body:
Hi Juleen, 

I've used MotionCor3 a bit, as MotionCor2 fails to run on newer GPUs. As 
far as I can tell, it's just a drop-in replacement. The only difference I 
noticed so far is that the "-Serial" flag does not work with tiff-files 
anymore, so you need to iterate over them instead of just giving the 
folder. 

Hope that helps, 
Benedikt



On Wednesday, July 16, 2025 at 10:02:26 PM UTC+2 jdic...@gmail.com wrote:

> Hi Everyone,
> Has anyone tried motion cor3? Any thoughts on how it does compared to 
> motion cor2? Thanks!
>
> Warm Regards,
> Juleen
>
